## Summary
- What problem does this PR solve?

## Scope
- [ ] Engine
- [ ] Case data/schema
- [ ] UI
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Docs/CI

## PRD acceptance checks
- [ ] Realistic task timing demonstrated
- [ ] Deliberate setup gates enforced (leads/pads/access/pacing/capture)
- [ ] Event-driven narrative with no prompt spam
- [ ] Parallel tasks supported
- [ ] Debrief timeline includes key timing metrics
- [ ] Engine logic covered by tests

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run validate:cases`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (if UI changed)
